subuh.message: You are now under Allah's protection for the rest of the day.
Whoever prays the dawn prayer in congregation, it is as if he had prayed the whole night.
The two rak'ahs of Fajr are better than the world and all that is in it.
Angels come to you in succession by night and day. They meet at Fajr and Asr prayers.
Whoever prays Fajr is under the protection of Allah. So do not fall short with regard to the rights of Allah.

dzuhur.message: The most beloved of deeds to Allah are those that are most consistent, even if they are small.
Between every two adhans there is a prayer for whoever wishes to pray.
Whoever prays four rak'ahs before Dhuhr and four after, Allah will forbid the Fire from touching him.
Prayer is the pillar of the religion. Whoever establishes it has established the religion.

ashar.message: Whoever misses the Asr prayer, it is as if he lost his family and his wealth.
Angels come to you in succession by night and day. They meet at Fajr and Asr prayers.
Whoever guards his Fajr and Asr prayers will enter Paradise.
There is no prayer heavier upon the hypocrites than the Fajr and Isha prayers.

maghrib.message: Hasten to break the fast, for that is one of the practices of the people of goodness.
Pray Maghrib when the sun sets, and do not delay it until the stars appear.
Whoever prays the five daily prayers, Allah will prepare for him light, proof, and salvation.

isya.message: Whoever prays Isha in congregation, it is as if he stood for half the night.
Rest well. You finished the day in prayer.
Whoever prays Isha and Fajr in congregation, it is as if he stood the entire night in prayer.
The last prayer the Prophet left before passing was the Isha prayer.

qadhaMessages.message: The best of sinners are those who repent. Recovering a prayer is an act of faith, not failure.
Whoever oversleeps and misses a prayer, let him pray it when he remembers, for that is its time.
Allah loves a servant who, when he does a good deed, does it well.
Coming back is what matters. Every recovered prayer is a step closer to Allah.

celebrationMessages.message: Whoever prays the five daily prayers, Allah will prepare for him light, proof, and salvation on the Day of Resurrection.
Alhamdulillah. All five prayers completed today. That is true success.
The five daily prayers and Friday prayer to the next are expiation for what is between them.

streakMessages.message: Consistency is beloved to Allah. Keep going.
Your prayer streak is a sign of your heart's attachment to Allah.

comeback: Every new prayer is a fresh start. Allah loves those who keep returning.
Missing a prayer doesn't define you. Praying the next one does.
The door of repentance is always open. Just start with the next prayer.
progress: You're building a beautiful habit. Keep going.
Each prayer strengthens your connection with Allah.
Small steps lead to great journeys. You're doing well.
